stemHtml: An aircraft is flying IFR under a radar service and experiences a radio communication failure. According to ICAO/UK CAA procedures, for how long should the aircraft maintain the last assigned clearance?

options.a: 12 minutes from selecting 7600 on the transponder
options.b: 12 minutes from the last compulsory reporting point
options.c: 7 minutes from the last compulsory reporting point
options.d: 7 minutes from selecting 7600 on the transponder
